description: Style notebaggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for not condoning cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag, this bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit.Product DetailsPink corduroy outer that has one large main zipped compartment with two internal zip pocketsOne fabric strap with a stylish fabic manipulation on frontEasy to grip, star shaped zip pullBrand name printed at the sideMaterial and CareCorduroy fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 28 cmWidth: 47 cmDepth: 12 cm
